queries.question: List science fiction books and romance books published in 2018.
queries.sql:
SELECT Books.Title 
FROM Books JOIN BookPublishingHistory ON Books.ISBN = BookPublishingHistory.ISBN
WHERE (Books.Genre = 'Science Fiction' OR Books.Genre = 'Romance') AND BookPublishingHistory.YearOfPublication = 2018
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?books a :Book .
  ?bookpublishinghistory a :BookPublishingHistory .
  ?bookpublishinghistory p:hasBooks ?books .
  ?books p:Title ?title .
  ?books p:Genre ?genre_w .
  ?books p:Genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?bookpublishinghistory p:YearOfPublication ?yearofpublication_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genre_w) = "Science Fiction" || STR(?genre_w2) = "Romance")) && (STR(?yearofpublication_w) = "2018" || STR(?yearofpublication_w) = "2018.0")))
}
